description: Letter from Eliyya b. Yehuda b. Yahya from Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1050. The writer is on a ship that is about to sail in the morning to al-Lādhiqiyya (Latakia). He expresses concern about a qunbār that was forced to stop at the shore. He also mentions two ships of Abū ʿAbdallah (Ibn al-Baʿbāʿ), a qārib of Bū ʿAlī al-Shāmī and three ships from the Shām. Also mentions a shipment of camphor and the account of Yehuda b. Moshe b. Sughmar. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #706) VMR
tags: ships, camphor, Ibn al-Ba'ba', qarib, qunbar
description_he: מכתב מאליה בן יהודה בן יחיא, אלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, כ-1050, על ספינות שעומדות לצאת ועל משלוח קמפור
